evidence.snippet: Field-proven inertial navigation systems built for denied, degraded, and disrupted environments – where failure isn't an option.
Advanced Navigation is a global leader in navigation and autonomous systems, delivering accuracy and performance when GNSS signals are weak or lost.
Advanced Navigation is a leading manufacturer of fibre-optic gyroscopes (FOG) and digital fibre-optic gyroscope (DFOG) inertial navigation systems (INS).

items.notes: Core product families: MEMS and FOG IMU/AHRS, MEMS and FOG GNSS/INS, GNSS compass, acoustic underwater positioning

evidence.snippet: Hydrus Revolutionary underwater vehicle Depth Rating 300 m Video Resolution 4K @ 60 FPS Range 2 km Endurance 3 hrs
the company has progressed into deep technology fields, including robotics, inertial, photonic and quantum sensing, artificial intelligence, underwater acoustics, and GPS antennas and receivers.

items.notes: Hydrus is a complete micro autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV/UUV) listed under Acoustic Navigation & Micro AUV

evidence.snippet: Headquartered in Sydney, Australia, with research and production facilities nationwide and offices globally. Advanced Navigation is an Australian manufacturer exporting worldwide.
APAC +61 2 7908 9385 Level 12, 255 George Street Sydney NSW 2000 Australia
Integrate our INS into your drones, autonomous vehicles, or subsea platforms, and market them to a global customer base with significantly fewer regulatory hurdles.
Field-proven inertial navigation systems built for denied, degraded, and disrupted environments – where failure isn't an option.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Primary business is selling INS/IMU/AHRS navigation subsystems that integrate into customer drone and autonomous platforms. Also manufactures the Hydrus complete micro AUV.

products.notes: Additional accessories visible in nav but without 10-word product-page descriptions: Poseidon (subsea GNSS antenna), Kinematica (GNSS/INS PPK software). Legacy products with datasheet pages but not in current nav: Spatial, Spatial FOG Dual, Orientus.

evidence.snippet: Advanced Navigation delivers high-performance INS solutions manufactured without ITAR-controlled components, allowing you to achieve both market-leading technical capabilities and unrestricted global deployment.

ndaa.notes: Site explicitly promotes ITAR-free status throughout but does not mention NDAA Section 848/889 compliance anywhere in the corpus. ITAR-free is the adjacent compliance claim.

evidence.snippet: Advanced Navigation is ISO9001 certified and follows its strategic framework to proactively identify improvements across the business.
Our rigorous automated testing surpasses industry standards to guarantee customers receive the most reliable and consistent products possible.

Our state-of-the-art facilities manage every phase of development from design and quality testing to automated manufacturing across photonics, pressure-tolerant electronics, acoustic technologies, and FOG components.

readiness.notes: Serial production with vertically integrated, ISO9001-certified, automated manufacturing in Australia. Catalog SKUs with published datasheets; shortest industry lead time claimed.

tagline: Sydney-based maker of inertial navigation systems—MEMS and fiber-optic IMU/AHRS, GNSS/INS, acoustic positioning, and subsea platforms. Certus and Boreas lines dominate the precision-navigation portfolio across air, land, and sea. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of defense adoption (Boeing, Anduril) and mining traction is solid, but supply-chain integration details and US regulatory clearance remain opaque.
